mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_favorites (id, user_id, post_id, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{postId}, NOW(3))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_favorites SET folder_id = #{folderId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
UPDATE user_favorites SET folder_id = NULL WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND folder_id = #{folderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorites WHERE user_id = #{userId}
